en: Don't you think I sound like shit? No, it's good. Can we try it again?
ko: 나 목소리 별로 같지 않아? 아니, 좋아. 다시 해볼래?

en: Sure, yep. Sure, it's your money. Literally.
You are mine, I will test you, belong to you forever.
ko: 너는 내 것이고, 나는 너를 시험할 거야, 영원히 너에게 속해.

en: Sounds a lot better. We need to get experimental.
Try bouncing us left and right for the ah-ah.
You are mine, I will test you, belong to you forever.
ko: 너는 내 것이고, 나는 너를 시험할 거야, 영원히 너에게 속해.

en: Now, dead centre for the last.
Do we have time to stop for more?
The studio opens at 8, so we've got 30 more minutes.
